seoTitle: Silergy Products | DC-DC Converters, LED Drivers & USB PD | LiTong
seoDescription: Explore Silergy's comprehensive product portfolio including high-efficiency DC-DC converters, AC-DC controllers, LED drivers, and USB PD solutions.

faqs.question: What product categories does Silergy offer?
faqs.answer: Silergy offers four main product categories: DC-DC Converters including buck, boost, and buck-boost converters; AC-DC Controllers for offline power supplies; LED Drivers for lighting applications; and USB Power Delivery solutions for fast charging.
faqs.decisionGuide: Browse our product categories to find the right solution for your application.

categories.name: DC-DC Converters
categories.description: High-efficiency DC-DC converters for portable and industrial applications.
categories.longDescription: Silergy DC-DC converters offer industry-leading efficiency and reliability for demanding applications.

products.name: 1A Synchronous Buck Converter
products.shortDescription: High-efficiency 1A synchronous buck converter with 2.5-5.5V input range. Ideal for industrial and consumer applications with excellent performance and reliability.
descriptionParagraphs: The SY8088 is a high-efficiency synchronous buck converter.
It features internal power switches and compensation.
Ideal for portable electronics applications.

faeReview.author: David Chen
faeReview.title: Power FAE
faeReview.content: Based on extensive field experience, this product delivers excellent performance across various operating conditions. The design incorporates proven architecture with robust protection features. Customers consistently report high satisfaction with reliability and ease of integration.

products.name: 2A Synchronous Buck Converter
products.shortDescription: High-efficiency 2A synchronous buck converter for higher power applications. Ideal for industrial and consumer applications with excellent performance and reliability.
descriptionParagraphs: The SY8089 delivers 2A output current with high efficiency.
Features internal switches and comprehensive protection.
Suitable for tablets and industrial applications.

products.name: 3A Synchronous Buck Converter
products.shortDescription: High-current 3A synchronous buck converter with adjustable output. Ideal for industrial and consumer applications with excellent performance and reliability.

Features adjustable output voltage and excellent load regulation.
Ideal for high-power portable applications.

products.name: Boost Converter
products.shortDescription: High-efficiency boost converter for battery-powered applications. Ideal for industrial and consumer applications with excellent performance and reliability.
descriptionParagraphs: The SY7208 is a synchronous boost converter.
Ideal for generating higher voltages from battery sources.

categories.name: AC-DC Controllers
categories.description: High-efficiency offline controllers for power adapters and chargers.
categories.longDescription: Silergy AC-DC controllers provide efficient power conversion for offline applications.

products.name: PWM Controller
products.shortDescription: High-efficiency PWM controller for flyback converters up to 65W. Ideal for industrial and consumer applications with excellent performance and reliability.
descriptionParagraphs: The SY50133 is a high-performance PWM controller.
Features green mode operation for low standby power.
Suitable for adapters up to 65W.

products.name: Primary-Side Controller
products.shortDescription: Primary-side regulation controller eliminating optocoupler need. Ideal for industrial and consumer applications with excellent performance and reliability.
descriptionParagraphs: The SY50282 provides primary-side regulation.
Eliminates need for optocoupler and secondary feedback.
Reduces BOM cost and improves reliability.

products.name: QR Flyback Controller
products.shortDescription: Quasi-resonant flyback controller for high-efficiency adapters. Ideal for industrial and consumer applications with excellent performance and reliability.
descriptionParagraphs: The SY50103 uses quasi-resonant switching.
Reduces switching losses and EMI.
Ideal for high-efficiency power supplies.

products.name: Sync Rectifier Controller
products.shortDescription: Synchronous rectifier controller for high-efficiency secondary side. Ideal for industrial and consumer applications with excellent performance and reliability.
descriptionParagraphs: The SY5018 controls external MOSFET for synchronous rectification.
Replaces diode rectifier for higher efficiency.
